label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where each present ends up after all the swaps. There are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Initially, each has a different colored present. Let me list out the starting gifts first. - Alice: brown present - Bob: orange ball - Claire: green present - Dave: blue present - Eve: white present Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap step by step and track who has what. First swap: Eve and Bob swap their gifts. Before this swap: - Eve has white - Bob has orange ball After swapping: - Eve now has the orange ball - Bob now has the white present Second swap: Eve and Claire swap their gifts. Now, Eve has the orange ball and Claire has the green present. After swapping: - Eve gets the green present - Claire gets the orange ball Third swap: Eve and Dave swap their gifts. Currently, Eve has green and Dave has blue. After swapping: - Eve gets blue - Dave gets green Fourth swap: Dave and Alice swap their gifts. At this point, Dave has green (from the previous swap) and Alice has brown. After swapping: - Dave gets brown - Alice gets green Fifth swap: Claire
